feedItems.description: allocated £43.9m to Environment & Streets (≈£119 per resident)
allocated £150.3m to Adult Social Care (≈£409 per resident)
allocated £90.1m to Children's Social Care (≈£245 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £106 (5.1%) to £2186
